title: Vrtl Pirates branding — Rankett audit-tool copy editor
html:
Rankett agency-side Settings → Branding → Audit Tool Copy panel for Vrtl Pirates (Yahir's own test agency). Live preview of vrtl-pirates.visibility.rankett.com showing customizable badge ("FREE AI VISIBILITY TOOL"), headline ("See how AI models rank your business"), subheadline ("Discover your AI visibility score in under 2 minutes"), buttons (Start Audit / Continue Analysis / Run Audit), email-capture copy ("Your Report is Ready"), and a "Powered by Rankett" footer that gets removed on Partner Plan — the ghost white label config screen in working form.

TL;DR

  • Vrtl Pirates is Yahir's dogfood agency tenant inside Rankett at vrtl-pirates.visibility.rankett.com.
  • Branding panel exposes every customer-facing string for white-label rebrand — full ghost white label surface.
  • "Powered by Rankett" footer is the visible-vs-removed toggle distinguishing free vs Partner tier.

rankett · vrtl pirates · ghost white label · ai visibility engine · diddles
